name: Low-Calorie Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine egg yolks and skim milk.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture coats a metal spoon.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cooled custard mixture, along with vanilla extract, sweetener, and flavoring.
6. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
7. Serve chilled in individual cups, sprinkled with ground nutmeg.
1/2 cup serving - 70 calories, 1/2 med-fat meat Exchange + 1/2 Milk exchange. 6 grams carbohydrate, 6 grams protein, 3 grams fat, 80 mg sodium, 207 mg potassium, 74 mg cholesterol.
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
